# Slideshot Agent Skills

This is the agent skill definition for [Slideshot](https://slideshot.ai/). Slideshot is an agent-first API that allows you to record polished demo videos from text descriptions directly from your AI agent of choice (Claude Code, Codex, etc.).

## Example demo videos generated by Slideshot:

### Product Hunt demo
https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cfd3def0-530e-4146-a87a-52fca648c77e

> Prompt: Open search, search for the product called <Arcmark>, then click to open it and then click the Visit Website button from the Arcmark product page.

### Notion demo
https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a088e874-49b9-407c-a0b2-dbfe2124b18a

> Prompt: Login, then find the Notion AI menu in the sidebar and click on it. Next, execute the request in the input field, and then open the Welcome to Notion page from the sidebar.

## What's in this repo?

This repo currently publishes one canonical skill, `slideshot-cli`, which teaches agent tools how to use the public [`slideshot-cli`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/slideshot-cli) package to record product demo videos from a natural-language text description.

## Install

Use [npx skills](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) to install skills directly:

```bash
npx skills add slideshot/slideshot-cli

# List available skills
npx skills add slideshot/slideshot-cli --list
```

### Install via Skillkit

Use [SkillKit](https://github.com/rohitg00/skillkit) to install skills across multiple AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc.):

```
npx skillkit install slideshot/slideshot-cli

# List available skills
npx skillkit install slideshot/slideshot-cli --list
```

## Usage

Once installed, just ask your agent to record product demo videos. Here are a few example conversations.

### Successful run

```text
User: 
Record a demo of our onboarding flow at https://app.example.com. 
Start signed out, sign in with the saved default credential, create a project called "Summer Launch", and end on the analytics dashboard with the revenue chart visible.

Agent: I’ll create a Slideshot run for that flow and wait for it to finish.

Agent: The run was created successfully. I’m waiting for completion now.

Agent: The run succeeded. Public artifacts are available.
Agent: I can download `demo.mp4`, `raw.mp4`, and `plan.json`.

User: Download both videos.

Agent: Downloaded `demo.mp4` and `raw.mp4`.
```

### One-time password flow

```text
User: Record a demo of logging into https://staging.example.com and opening the billing settings page.

Agent: I’ll create the run and wait for it. If the login flow asks for a one-time password, I’ll ask you for it and continue the same run.

Agent: The run is waiting for input.
Agent: Prompt from Slideshot: "Enter the 6-digit one-time password sent to your email."

User: 482193

Agent: Submitted the one-time password and resumed the run.

Agent: The run succeeded. I can now download the generated video artifacts.
```

### Video customization options

```text
User: 
Record a polished demo of our pricing flow at https://example.com/pricing.
Blur visible email addresses, show keyboard shortcuts in the final demo, and use a diagonal gradient background from #0B1020 to #1D4ED8.

Agent: 
I’ll create the run with video customization options for:
- `blur_emails: true`
- `shortcuts: true`
- `background.type: "gradient"`
- `background.from: "#0B1020"`
- `background.to: "#1D4ED8"`
- `background.direction: "diagonal"`

Agent: The run is in progress. I’ll wait for completion and then download the final `demo.mp4` if it succeeds.
```
